channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US rulings hold Meta accountable for harm to young users
item.description: In early March, the tech giant Meta, owner of Facebook and Instagram, faced two major setbacks in separate United States courtrooms – one in New Mexico and another in California. Over the course of ju...

item.title: Exploring Life and Empathy in Michael Winkler’s Griefdogg
item.description: Michael Winkler’s second novel, Griefdogg, follows his acclaimed debut, Grimmish, which made history as the first self-published novel shortlisted for the Miles Franklin Award. The story centres on Je...

item.title: Weak ambassadorial appointments undermine Kenya's foreign policy
item.description: The article highlights a serious concern about Kenya’s foreign policy being compromised by poor ambassadorial appointments. Many appointments are driven by political loyalty or tribal affiliations rat...

item.title: DPWH continues infrastructure projects despite rising fuel costs
item.description: The Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) has decided to continue ongoing infrastructure projects despite recent increases in fuel prices. Secretary Vince Dizon rejected calls to temporarily ...

item.title: Challenges Persist for Legacy App Performance on Apple Silicon and ARM-Based Systems
item.description: The discussion centers around the performance of older, legacy applications, particularly on systems utilizing Apple Silicon and other ARM-based processors. Several users are experiencing significant ...

item.title: Four practical ways to refresh your home with fresh air, natural scents and simple cleaning tips
item.description: After a renovation, hosting guests or as winter turns to spring, many Canadian homes can feel stagnant and in need of a reset. Beyond basic cleaning and decluttering, a thoughtful refresh can improve ...

item.title: Justin Bieber revisits early YouTube hits during Coachella 2026 set
item.description: During his headlining performance at Coachella 2026, Canadian pop star Justin Bieber treated the audience to a nostalgic journey through his early YouTube career. After performing tracks from his late...

item.title: Institutional Capture in South African Universities: An Emerging Threat
item.description: Professor Thandwa Mthembu, Vice-Chancellor of Durban University of Technology, reflects on the parallels between state capture and what he terms 'institutional capture' in South Africa’s higher educat...

item.title: Calgary hosts FIFA World Cup trophy tour despite snowy conditions
item.description: Excited soccer enthusiasts gathered outside the Saddledome in Calgary on Sunday to catch a glimpse of the FIFA World Cup trophy, which is touring Canada ahead of the 2026 tournament. Fans were thrille...

item.title: Pope Leo embarks on a 10-day Africa tour addressing key issues of the continent
item.description: On Monday, April 13, 2026, Pope Leo XIV commenced an ambitious ten-day tour across four African countries, marking an important diplomatic and pastoral visit. The first U.S. pope will initially spend ...

item.title: Rust's Popularity Shows Signs of Slowing but Remains Strong Among Experts
item.description: The article discusses the recent performance of the Rust programming language in the TIOBE Index, which tracks language popularity using search engine data. According to TIOBE’s CEO, Rust’s growth app...

item.title: DILG Confirms Atong Ang Remains in the Philippines Despite Recent Arrest Attempt
item.description: The Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG) has confirmed that Atong Ang, who was nearly arrested last week, continues to stay within the Philippines. Authorities had earlier attempted ...

item.title: Political violence threatens Kenya's democracy as goons disrupt rallies and events
item.description: Thuggery has become part of Kenya's political scene and this should worry every Kenyan. Over the weekend in Kikuyu Township, Kiambu County, hooligans blocked roads, robbed motorists and damaged vehicl...

item.title: Zambia gears up for 2026 general elections as President Hichilema seeks re-election amid PF internal restructuring
item.description: Zambia is heading towards a significant political contest with the general elections scheduled for 13 August 2026. President Hakainde Hichilema, who secured victory in 2021 by defeating former preside...

item.title: Trump criticises Pope Leo over Iran stance and meetings with Democrats
item.description: Donald Trump launched a sharp public critique of Pope Leo, calling him 'weak on crime' and questioning his positions on nuclear weapons and US foreign policy. Speaking as he exited Air Force One at Jo...

item.title: ACT court to assess elderly woman’s fitness to plead in crash causing loss of unborn baby
item.description: An ACT Supreme Court hearing is examining whether an 81-year-old woman, Rosemary Jean O’Mally, is mentally fit to plead to a charge of culpable driving causing grievous bodily harm. The charge stems f...

item.title: Vice Admiral Mark Hammond appointed as next Chief of the Defence Force
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has officially announced that Vice Admiral Mark Hammond, currently serving as Chief of Navy, will be appointed as Australia's next Chief of the Defence Force later this...

item.title: Philippines, US, and Australia successfully complete joint maritime drills focusing on logistics interoperability in West Philippine Sea
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP), together with the United States Indo-Pacific Command and the Australian Defence Force, conducted a Multilateral Maritime Cooperative Activity (MMCA) in the W...

item.title: Government outlines short-term fuel levy relief and long-term energy strategy
item.description: South Africa faces uncertainty due to the ongoing Middle East conflict, which could impact global trade and energy markets. The government’s recent intervention, cutting the fuel levy by R3 per litre ...

item.title: Oga Obinna gives practical money-making tips to Mbavu the Destroyer after boxing loss to Majembe
item.description: Media personality Oga Obinna has given useful advice to boxer Mbavu the Destroyer on how to turn his recent fame into cash following his technical knockout defeat by Majembe on April 4 at Kasarani Ind...
